query: SELECT o.id, o.name, o.primaryAdminId, o.onboardingStatus, u.id as admin_id, u.email, u.name as admin_name, u.role, u.platformRole FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.primaryAdminId = u.id WHERE o.name LIKE '%Yamany%' AND o.name LIKE '%YDH%';
